proposed_definition: A neuron located in the skin that produces and secretes neuropeptides or neurotransmitters, contributing to local tissue homeostasis, vasodilation, and neuro-immune communication. This cell is derived from neural crest progenitors and identified in developing skin and skin organoid models.
distinguishing_features: Neurosecretory function in skin, neural crest-derived, produces neuropeptides for local tissue regulation
